name: google-sites-mcp
description: MCP server providing semantic operations for Google Sites editor

browser.visible: Attach to user's running Chrome via CDP (default)

data.user: Use user's Chrome profile with credentials and stored data (default)
data.sandbox: Use a clean browser profile with no stored data

operations.name: health_check
operations.description: Check connectivity to Google Sites editor

operations.name: show_scripts
operations.description: List all JavaScript functions used by this MCP server

operations.name: get_site_info
operations.description: Get site title, site name, page title, save status, URL

operations.name: set_site_title
operations.description: Set the site title (browser tab and top bar)

operations.name: set_site_name
operations.description: Set the site name in the hero/header area

operations.name: set_page_title
operations.description: Set the page title in the hero section

operations.name: insert_text_box
operations.description: Insert a new text box with optional content and style

operations.name: set_text_content
operations.description: Replace content of selected text element

operations.name: format_text
operations.description: Apply bold/italic/underline to selected text

operations.name: set_text_style
operations.description: Set paragraph style (Normal, Title, Heading, Subheading)

operations.name: insert_link
operations.description: Insert a hyperlink on selected text

operations.name: insert_button
operations.description: Insert a button with label and link

operations.name: insert_divider
operations.description: Insert a horizontal divider line

operations.name: insert_spacer
operations.description: Insert vertical spacing

operations.name: insert_embed
operations.description: Embed external content by URL or embed code

operations.name: insert_image
operations.description: Open the image picker to insert an image

operations.name: insert_collapsible_group
operations.description: Insert a collapsible/accordion group

operations.name: insert_table_of_contents
operations.description: Insert a table of contents

operations.name: insert_image_carousel
operations.description: Insert an image carousel

operations.name: add_page
operations.description: Add a new page to the site

operations.name: list_pages
operations.description: List all pages in the current site

operations.name: set_header_type
operations.description: Set header type (Cover, Large banner, Banner, Title only)

operations.name: delete_header
operations.description: Delete the page header

operations.name: delete_section
operations.description: Delete the currently selected section

operations.name: duplicate_section
operations.description: Duplicate the currently selected section

operations.name: set_section_color
operations.description: Set section background color scheme (Style 1-3)

operations.name: set_theme
operations.description: Change site theme (Simple, Aristotle, Diplomat, Vision, Level, Impression)

operations.name: set_theme_color
operations.description: Set theme color variant

operations.name: undo
operations.description: Undo the last editing action

operations.name: redo
operations.description: Redo the last undone action

operations.name: preview_site
operations.description: Enter preview mode

operations.name: exit_preview
operations.description: Exit preview mode

operations.name: open_settings
operations.description: Open site settings dialog
